headline: Shares of oil-related companies are trading higher amid the continuing Middle East conflict and expectations for a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz shipping chokepoint by Iran. Also, reports suggest Iran attacked a US-owned tanker near Kuwait.
summary: Shares of oil-related companies are trading higher amid the continuing Middle East conflict and expectations for a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz shipping chokepoint by Iran. Also, reports suggest Iran attacked a US-owned tanker near Kuwait.

headline: Forget Tech Stocks. If Oil Goes to $100 These Energy Plays Are Unstoppable
summary: AI-driven tech stocks have dominated financial headlines for months, capturing the imagination of retail and institutional investors alike. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The geopolitical calculus just shifted. The death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on February 28, 2026 has injected serious supply-risk premium back into oil markets. WTI crude ... headline: 10-year Treasury yield rises as inflation fear from higher oil prices outweighs jobs decline
summary: U.S. Treasury yields pushed higher Friday as investors looked at the likely inflation effect of higher crude oil prices resulting from war in the Middle East.

raw.headline: 10-year Treasury yield rises as inflation fear from higher oil prices outweighs jobs decline
raw.summary: U.S. Treasury yields pushed higher Friday as investors looked at the likely inflation effect of higher crude oil prices resulting from war in the Middle East.

headline: U.S. crude oil tops $90 per barrel after Trump demands unconditional surrender from Iran
summary: The oil market is worried that Gulf countries will have to shut production if tankers are unable to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: U.S. crude oil tops $90 per barrel after Trump demands unconditional surrender from Iran
raw.summary: The oil market is worried that Gulf countries will have to shut production if tankers are unable to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.
